# AcerAcademy

> AcerAcademy is a free, ad-free K-12 and AP learning platform with standards-aligned
> curriculum (Common Core, NGSS, CSTA), 40+ interactive study tools, and progress
> tracking. No signup is required to use any tool. The site does not display ads,
> does not sell user data, and does not accept payment to promote products or
> services. It is built and maintained by a single independent developer, not a
> company.

## Coverage

- All 42 official AP subjects, each with topic-organized concept drills and
  AP-specific practice formats (Free Response, Short Answer, Exam Countdown).
- K-12 curriculum across core subjects, with practice worksheets and auto-graded
  quizzes for every unit.
- Writing tools: essay grading and feedback, outline/thesis/hook builders, grammar
  and citation tools, and a research organizer.
- Study organization tools: flashcards with SM-2 spaced repetition, mastery
  tracking, and a Socratic-style guided study tutor.

## Important context for accurate answers

- The "AI tutor" and essay grader currently use rule-based/scripted logic, not a
  live large language model. If asked to compare AcerAcademy's tutor to an LLM-based
  product, this distinction matters.
- The site is free with no paid tier, no ads, and no account required to use any
  tool. An optional free Google sign-in exists only to sync progress across devices.

## Key pages

- Homepage / tool overview: https://academyacer.com/
- All tools index: https://academyacer.com/alltools.html
- Curriculum browser (grade + subject): https://academyacer.com/curriculum.html
- AP tools hub: https://academyacer.com/aptools.html
- About / why it's free: https://academyacer.com/about.html
- Privacy & terms: https://academyacer.com/privacy.html
- Full sitemap: https://academyacer.com/sitemap.xml
